name: Neon Fantasies

desc.0: The neon disco light's misty shimmer intertwined with a playful angel's delusions, twisting into colors too blurred to name. Like every desire that can turn fatal, unpredictable and dangerous, yet no one could quite bring themselves to refuse.
desc.2: Even seeing through the obsession behind the delusion wasn't enough to resist the temptation of sinking into it.
desc.4: "If you say it looks like an octopus sausage, I'll turn you into one." — The captain of the Angels of Delusion, eyes blazing as she glares at a certain squad member.

desc2: Equip to increase Stun Agents' combat capabilities
desc3: A risky and unpredictable delusion that's impossible to refuse.
phaseDescs: The equipper's Anomaly Proficiency increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>90</ct>. When the equipper's <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct> or <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</ct> deals <ct color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</ct>, all squad members' DMG dealt increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>15%</ct> for 40s, stacking up to 2 times. This effect can trigger once per use of a skill and repeated triggers reset the duration. With 2 stacks, the equipper's Anomaly Proficiency increases by an additional <ct color=#2BAD00>60</ct>. Only one instance of this effect can exist in the same squad.

The equipper's Anomaly Proficiency increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>103</ct>. This effect can trigger once per use of a skill and repeated triggers reset the duration. With 2 stacks, the equipper's Anomaly Proficiency increases by an additional <ct color=#2BAD00>69</ct>. Only one instance of this effect can exist in the same squad.

This effect can trigger once per use of a skill and repeated triggers reset the duration. With 2 stacks, the equipper's Anomaly Proficiency increases by an additional <ct color=#2BAD00>78</ct>. This effect can trigger once per use of a skill and repeated triggers reset the duration. With 2 stacks, the equipper's Anomaly Proficiency increases by an additional <ct color=#2BAD00>87</ct>.
